findings.description: The hint `ExtendedValidation_yyyymmddConvertor` is missing from s3 hints. This identifier appears in the section text as a cross-reference target (`:ref:`ExtendedValidation_yyyymmddConvertor``) for the 西暦(年月日)フォーマット date check, and is the closest PascalCase identifier in the section content.
findings.source_evidence: 実装済み: 「西暦(年月日)フォーマット(詳細は :ref:`ExtendedValidation_yyyymmddConvertor` を参照)」
